creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text: It looks like most of the rest of the slowdown comes from inefficient implementations in insert_to_strtab() and lookup_string().  The latter can be replaced with memmem(), which helps a bit.  In a lot of cases when we call lookup_string() we should in principle be able to reuse the shstrtab index from the old section and thus avoid the lookup entirely.  However, insert_to_strtab() may modify the table in place if it finds a string in the table that is a suffix of the string to be inserted.
